name: @webfetch/core
description: License-first federated image search core: ranker, cache, provider federation, pHash dedupe, EXIF/IPTC/XMP metadata.

scripts.build: bun run build:js && bun run build:types && bun run build:fixup
scripts.build:types: tsc src/index.ts --emitDeclarationOnly --declaration --declarationMap false --outDir dist --rootDir src --allowImportingTsExtensions --module ESNext --target ES2022 --moduleResolution bundler --lib ES2022,DOM --strict --noImplicitAny --noUncheckedIndexedAccess --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --resolveJsonModule --types bun
scripts.build:fixup: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'),path=require('node:path');if(fs.existsSync('dist/index.js')){const s=fs.readFileSync('dist/index.js','utf8');fs.writeFileSync('dist/index.js',s.replace(/^#!\/usr\/bin\/env bun/m,'#!/usr/bin/env node'));}const walk=d=>{for(const e of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const p=path.join(d,e.name);if(e.isDirectory())walk(p);else if(p.endsWith('.d.ts')){const s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8').replaceAll('.ts\"','.js\"');fs.writeFileSync(p,s);}}};if(fs.existsSync('dist'))walk('dist');"
